title: Front Office Manager - Goibibo Hotels - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Goibibo Hotels - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Goibibo Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goibibo Hotels:
Goibibo Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo Hotels!
